notes: v0.16.18 — BASTION shield gauge HUD widget. New bottom-center HUD widget while flying BASTION: 'SHIELD' label + 3 diamond pips (filled = available charge, hollow = used) + a clear status line that cycles between '[SPACE]  2/3' when armed, '[ACTIVE]  0.6s' during a burst, and 'RECHARGING  4.7s' when on cooldown. Colour states: gold when armed, dim grey when waiting, cyan when burst is running. Removed the confusing in-world pulsing ring + floating [SPACE] prompt around the ship (players couldn't tell whether the ring meant 'shield up' or 'shield available'). Ship now keeps just the notched charge ring + the deploy bubble during the active burst. Windows only.
